api_key.description: Qonto API key, typically formatted '<organization-slug>:<secret-key>'. Sent verbatim as the Authorization header (no Bearer prefix, matching Qonto's own convention). Never logged.

base_url.description: Qonto API base URL. Defaults to https://thirdparty.qonto.com/v2.

iban.description: IBAN of the Qonto bank account to read transactions for. Required for the transactions stream.

start_date.description: Lower bound sent as the start_date query parameter on every request, when set. Matches legacy's optional start_date passthrough.
